name: Backsplash Tile Calculator
seo_description: Calculate how many backsplash tiles and boxes you need. Enter wall dimensions and tile size to get exact tile count with 10% waste included.
desc: Free online backsplash tile calculator. Enter wall length and wall height to get instant results.
steps: 10 cm tile area: 0.10 × 0.10 = 0.01 m² per tile
mistakes: Measuring tile size in centimetres but area in metres — must be consistent
Forgetting the grout gap when placing tiles (use actual coverage area)
Not adding 10% extra for cuts, especially on mosaic or herringbone patterns
formula_display: Area = (Wall length × height) - window openings; Tiles = ceil(area ÷ tile_size² × 1.1); Boxes = ceil(tiles ÷ per_box)
